key.name: graph-type
key.description: Whether to show line graph or filled areas

key.name: network-interface
key.description: Specific interface name or 'any' for all interfaces

key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh network statistics

key.name: show-upload
key.description: Whether to display upload speed in graph

key.name: show-download
key.description: Whether to display download speed in graph

key.name: download-color
key.description: Hex color used for download traffic in the graph

key.name: upload-color
key.description: Hex color used for upload traffic in the graph
